title: U.S. – Canada Tariff and Trade Update Webinar: What’s Next for Cross-Border Investment and M&A?
content:
## U.S. – Canada Tariff and Trade Update Webinar: What’s Next for Cross-Border Investment and M&A?
Please join us online on Thursday, April 3 for our latest cross-border update where leading experts from both sides of the border will share insights into the evolving tariff landscape, investment trends and M&A activity between Canada and the U.S. during this unprecedented time. This comprehensive session will cover:
- Latest developments and the path ahead
- Impact on deal activity, valuations and structures
- Opportunities in energy, infrastructure, technology and other key industries
- Strategies and solutions to address new challenges
Our panel will be moderated by Awi Sinha , Partner and Co-Lead of McCarthy Tétrault’s Public Sector Group, and will feature the following McCarthy Tétrault partners:
- Maxine Ethier , Partner, Energy & Infrastructure
- Martha Harrison , Partner, International Trade and Investment
- Thomas McInerney , Partner, Energy & Resources
- Matthew Cumming , Managing Partner, Private Equity & M&A
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program has been approved in accordance with the requirements of the New York State Continuing Legal Education Board for a maximum of 1.0 credit hours, all of which can be applied towards the Areas of Professional Practice requirement. It is appropriate for both newly admitted (transitional) and experienced (nontransitional) attorneys. McCarthy Tétrault LLP has been certified by the New York State Continuing Legal Education Board as an Accredited Provider of continuing legal education.
